description.winks: Winks have strange powers. They are rare Dinoz who can mutate, both temporarily and permanently. They have developed in time a veritable science, passed from generation to generation.
description.sirain: Sirains are masters of the Atlanteid Islands. They have good tactical knowledge and always keep cool head in battle. Due to these skills, they can expose their opponents' weaknesses.
description.castivore: Covered in thick hair, Castivorous are peaceful herbivores. Despite their small legs they are very agile and can run quite fast. They are loyal companions to their masters and don't cause any trouble, except when they shed their thick coat of fur.
description.feross: Feross are particularly rare Dinoz. Their natural habitat is the fog of the Sticky Swamp, so it's very hard to see one of them and even harder to capture one. In spite of their nice mood, their might horn is extremely dangerous to their enemies.
description.gorilloz: Gorilloz are guardians of Dinoland's large forests, especially the Grumhel Forest. Although they are strong and ferocious, they rarely show themselves unless they must protect their territory from intruders. Gorilloz are at one with nature, and behind their stern looks they are very intelligent Dinoz.
description.hippoclamp: Hippoclamps are an elite soldier of the Atlanteid Islands. Many scientists have studied them and have concluded, that they are almost certainly the result of a successful mutation experiment on Kumps made by the Winks.
description.kabuki: Natives of the Caushemesh mountains, only a few Kakubis can be found in Dinotown Kingdom. People say that a small group of them exist, living isolated on a Southern island. In any case, they are fierce fighters !
description.mahamuti: Extinct for hundreds of years, the only way to get hold of a Mahamuti is to find a frozen one. The majority of masters who are in possession of this species are often caught off guard when it finally defrosts... They are known to destroy everything in their path...
description.moueffe: Moueffes are distant cousins of Dragons, and are proud of it. They love fire, have a tough and resistant hide, plus an outstanding sense of combat.
description.nuagoz: Life sometimes appears in odd circumstances. Life appears in strange forms; Cloudoz are a perfect example of this: made from a mix of water, air and lightning, a great deal of luck is required to give them life without them evaporating instantly. If successful they become very efficient fighters and are held in high regard by Dinoz Masters.
description.pigmou: Softpigs are small animals, renowned for their ferocity and stubbornness. They only understand those more powerful than themselves. For this reason they are notoriously hard to tame, but once a Master has established his authority, they will defend him without fail.
description.planaille: Glidwings are strange flying Dinoz. Their body contains many small receptors and muscles perfectly accustomed to control every inch of their wings. This enables them to manipulate and amplify wind and electricity, which they can use as powerful weapons. Although it must be said that they are not very intelligent and are easily controlled by a Master.
description.pteroz: Pteroz are flying Dinoz who soar above Big All-Hot. They have an impressive sense of territory and it's sensible to not disturb a Pteroz Mother protecting her eggs. They are quite hard to tame but excellent fighters.
description.quetzu: The Quetzu race originated on Nimbao, and since the end of the reign of Grizorg, and the isle becoming accessible to all Dinoz masters once more, it is becoming more and more common to see them around Dinoland. Their strength and agility remain unbalanced, and rarely do we find Quetzus advanced in years, when their potential is truly fulfilled.
description.rocky: Rockies are often hidden amongst the stones. They are living creatures half-animal half-mineral, their bodies are made entirely of Lodestone. This gives them the power to produce electricity at will by rubbing their bodies.
description.santaz: Santaz are from the mountains of Caushemesh. They are extremely rare and desired by Dinotown Dinoz Masters. They are difficult to tame but are very powerful and have the ability to perfectly master the Air element.
description.smog: Smog DNA was discovered by the great professor. Extracted from blood found in a leech trapped in ice, he successfully recreated the genetic code of this dinoz who was amongst the most formidable predators on the planet.
description.soufflet: Etherwasps are truly unique dinoz. After spending some time as larvae, they only really unveil their true form in adulthood, becoming a flying dinoz capable of mixing it up with the best of them! Originally from Nimbao, they are reclusive creatures, but since the troubles on the island escalated, they have started to be seen more and more.
description.toufufu: Tofufus are descended from their distant cousins, the Wistitis, and are extremely difficult to catch. They are quick and smart, and it seems as though someone has taught them kung-fu...
description.triceragnon: Recently imported from the lands of Thorgnole, the Tricerithumps is extremely sought after by the discerning Dinoz masters. Due to their aggressive nature, it can be difficult to move these Dinoz from port to port without leaving a few broken planks behind !
description.wanwan: Wanwan were once considered man's best friend, before they returned to the wild. Wanwan are vivacious, able to make multi-assaults, and their long, sharp teeth are deadly. Their fur conducts electricity, enabling them to store lightning and discharge when they choose.

description.PeauDeSerpent: Increase evasion by 10% and decrease Water attack speed by 15%
description.PropulsionDivine: Increase speed of Fire attack by 30% and decrease Fire element by 2
description.GriffesInfernales: Whenever the Dinoz hits an opponent with an **assault**, it burns it. The burn deals damage every cycle based on the opponent's Fire element.
description.Rouge: Increase **assaults** of the Dinoz by 20 when it is at the Big-All-Hot
description.CriDeGuerre: The Dinoz will use their most powerful A-skill on the next turn
description.FievreBrulante: Increase the chances of multi-attacks by 30%
description.BenedictionDArtemis: Allow the Dinoz to hunt an additional square
description.Joker: Increase or decrease (50/50) the Dinoz speed by 25% at the start of a fight
description.PaysDeCendre: All Dinoz (allies & foes) without at least 10 points in Fire will not use A and E skills during the user's next 3 turns
description.ReceptacleRocheux: Cancel the type A and E Wood spherical skills of a Dinoz
description.PlumesDePhoenix: Revive the Dinoz with 12 HP during the battle, increase initiative and speed by 10 but the Dinoz cannot be healed
description.AcclamationFraternelle: Increase the energy recovery speed of all Dinoz by 30%
description.VideEnergetique: 5% chance to reduce the energy speed recovery by 15% when hit with an assault
description.BouclierDinoz: Automatically protect the Dinoz with the least life points by taking damage in its stead for the duration of the combat
description.Courbatures: Decrease the maximum energy of an opponent by 30%
description.ForceControl: The Dinoz will deal a minimum of 10 damage on assaults
description.CourantDeVie: Increase Water **defense** by 20 and increases Wood **assaults** by 20
description.Berserk: Double **all assaults** strength, but prevent the Dinoz from using any E and A skills
description.Sharignan: Copy a skill which has already been used by an opponent and keeps it until the end of the combat
description.Amazonie: All Dinoz (allies and enemies) without at least 10 points in Wood will not be able to use A and E skills during the user's next 3 turns unless they are victim of an attack which costs them at least 10 hit points
description.EauDivine: Double the number of HP restored by the Dinoz when resting
description.RadiationsGamma: Increase all **assaults** strength by 5, health points by 30 and decrease initiative by 10
description.Bleu: Increase all **assaults** strength by 20 when the Dinoz is at the Atlantean Islands
description.CarapaceBlindee: Increase armor by 50% and reduce speed by 20%
description.DieteChromatique: Lock an opponent on their current element
description.EffluveAphrodisiaque: The Dinoz can be followed by an additional Dinoz
description.Nemo: Whilst fishing, this allows the Dinoz to fish an additional square
description.Cleptomane: Prevent one enemy from using non-magic items during the fight. This takes effect at the beginning of the fight.
description.Abysse: All Dinoz (allies and enemies) without at least 10 points in Water have their assault strength reduced by 25% during the user's next 3 turns
description.BanniDesDieux: Stop the selected enemy from summoning their deity
description.Hyperventilation: Decrease the endurance of all opponents by 20%
description.TherapieDeGroupe: The Dinoz will recover as many HP as the enemy team recovers when it uses a healing action
description.ReceptacleTesla: Block A and E sphere lightning skills of a Dinoz
description.StimulationCardiaque: Increase the Dinoz energy recovery speed by 20%
description.MorsureDuSoleil: Dazzle an opponent for a medium duration. Its **assaults** have one chance out of 3 to hit their target.
description.BatterieSupplementaire: Increase max HP by 50 and reduce initiative by 15
description.Einstein: Allow a Dinoz to search an additional square during fission
description.ReceptacleAerien: Cancel the type A and E Air spherical skills of a Dinoz for the remainder of the fight
description.FeuDeStElme: Dinoz (allies and enemies) with a lightning element lower than 10 lose 5% of their life each turn for the next 3 turns of the caster
description.Oracle: Double the invocation launch rate in a battle
description.ForceDeZeus: Increase the power of all Lightning **assaults** by 20
description.Blanc: Increase the strength of **all assaults** by 20 if the Dinoz is at Nimbao
description.DoubleFace: 50% chance to increase or reduce the caster's initiative by 10 at the start of a fight
description.Ouranos: All fighters (allies and enemies) with less than 10 Air element have their speed reduced by 50% for the next 3 turns of the caster
description.LonDuhaut: Allow the Dinoz to search an additional square when harvesting
description.SurplisDhades: Allow the Dinoz to be equipped with an additional battle item
description.ReceptacleThermique: Cancel the type A and E Fire spherical skills of a Dinoz
description.QiGong: Absorb all energy from a Dinoz during an assault
description.Sylphides: The spirits of the wind carry an opponent out of combat
description.Messie: Increase the maximum number of Dinoz by 3 (non-cumulative)
description.Mutinerie: All clones attack their own masters
description.OrigineCaushemeshenne: Increase **all assaults** strength by 30 when the Dinoz is at Caushemesh
description.Ecrasement: Send a shockwave of power 5 through all surrounding enemies based on the strongest element of the Dinoz
description.ForceDeLumiere: Increase **all assaults** strength by 30 when the Dinoz is in the Dark World
description.ChargePigmou: Attack one enemy with a Fire 5 and Wood 3 power
description.ForceDesTenebres: Increase Dinoz stamina and recovery by 25%
description.Bigmagnon: The Dinoz charges its opponent and stuns them for several turns
description.LoupGarou: Attack all enemies with a Wood power of 30
description.Salamandre: Attack one enemy with a Fire power of 40
description.Bouddha: All allies gain 10 defense for each element
description.TotemAncestralAeroporte: Attack one enemy with an Air power of 30
description.Leviathan: Attack all enemies with a Water power of 20
description.Vulcain: Attack all enemies with a Fire power 20
description.Fujin: Double the speed of all allies
description.ArmureDIfrit: Increase Fire defense of all allies by 20
description.Raijin: Attacks all enemies with a Lightning power of 20
description.Djinn: Attacks all enemies with an Air power of 20
description.Quetzacoatl: Attacks all enemies with a Lightning power of 40
description.Golem: Increase Lightning defense of all allies by 20
description.Hades: Poison and slow down all opponents
description.Ondine: Attack one enemy with a Water power of 30
description.Hercolubus: Deal non-elemental damage on all foes
description.RoiDesSinges: Increase evasion chance by 20% for all the Dinoz in group
description.BigMama: Empty the energy of the opposing Dinoz and inflicts 20 points of damage on them
description.Yggdrasil: Increase Wood defense of all allies by 20
description.BaleineBlanche: Increase Water defense of all allies by 20
description.Invocateur: Allow a Dinoz to learn its invocation skill.
description.Envol: Launch an assault and then flies back. Reserved for flying Dinoz
description.Leader: Increase the number of maximum active Dinoz by 3 (non-cumulative)
description.GrosDormeur: Allow the Dinoz to recover an additional action each day.
description.Veilleuse: Allow all followers to recover an extra daily action as well.
description.Matelasseur: All your active Dinoz recover an additional daily action (non-cumulative).

description.2: Climbing Gear enables your Dinoz to climb mountains.
description.1: This Buoy enables your Dinoz to cross water without drowning.
description.65: Your Dinoz has been Cursed by the Guardian of Cuzcous...
description.63: This Dinoz is a real demon... but where do they come from? ...
description.3: This Lantern enables your Dinoz to explore deep caves without the risk of getting lost.
description.13: These Waterlily pads are popular with the Zenzen monks.
description.4: This Shovel enables your Dinoz to dig and search for hidden treasures.
description.5: This shovel offers greater resistance, in addition its handle offers better grip so you will have fewer blisters.
description.6: The Lucky Shovel is broken, it will have to be fixed before you can use it again.
description.22: This small flute enables you to attract Scorpscubas and also gives you access to the Underwater Dome.
description.25: Your Dinoz can cross water using the Korgon fins.
description.34: This thorough book enables your Dinoz to deactivate his 'Attack' and 'Event' skills when he pleases (in the Details tab). It's an important guide for the good strategists of Dinoland wishing to adapt to the fighting conditions of each location!
description.26: This old stone was found by your Dinoz whilst digging. What is it for?
description.27: An ancient relic of the Ashpouk civilization. According to the Professor, it's a precious Totem.
description.10: A seemingly useless piece of basalt.
description.9: Some pure water from the Fountain of Youth. Keep it in your bag in case you are thirsty.
description.8: Sticky mud from the Swamp. It stinks, and it even moves from time to time as if it's trying to escape.
description.11: Zors Glove is a mysterious object. No one knows much about it.
description.40: This Backpack is extremely useful, with its numerous pockets and its fastenings drooping evrywhere. It gives you one more Slot in your combat gear!
description.32: This membership card allows the Dinoz to access the Lavapit Training Center!
description.59: This Gold Medal is awarded to a Dinoz for reaching the 30th stage of the BrutForce Tournament.
description.60: This Silver Medal rewards your Dinoz for winning the Dinoz Contest.
description.61: This Bronze Medal rewards your Dinoz for winning the Dinoz Contest.
description.54: This piece of Coral is so tough, it's almost unbreakable!
description.44: This cup thanks the captain of a team for his participation in the SuperDom!
description.45: This cup congratulates the captain of a team for his victories in the SuperDom!
description.46: This cup congratulates the captain of a team for his exploits at the SuperDom!
description.47: This cup commends the captain of a team for dominating the SuperDom!
description.39: This branch was given to you by the Forest Warden as a token of his gratitude for the services provided. Thanks to it, you can access the Fruity Shop!
description.55: This piece of ice is so cold that it seems like it will never thaw...
description.50: Your dinoz has realised its potential, it can now go beyond level 50 and level up as far as level 60!
description.51: Your dinoz has realised its potential, it can now go beyond level 60 and level up as far as level 70!
description.52: Your dinoz has revealed its full potential, it can now reach level 80!
description.62: This curse prevents your Dinoz from gaining combat experience!
description.66: Thanks to this very useful tool, your Dinoz can capture Monsters that will help him in all his fights!
description.35: This Bronze Medal rewards the Dinoz for having reached the 10th floor of the BrutForce Tournament.
description.36: This Silver Medal rewards the Dinoz for having reached the 20th floor of the BrutForce Tournament.
description.37: This Silver Medal rewards the Dinoz for having reached the 30th floor of the BrutForce Tournament.
description.38: This Medal, made entirely from diamond, is awarded to the Legendary Dinoz who complete the BrutForce Tournament.
description.49: This item allows your Dinoz to access part of the Dark World.
description.53: Your dinoz bathed in pure ether, it can now evolve using a whole new skills tree!
description.56: This potion neutralizes the effects of the SEDH Active poison.
description.41: This Dinoz has been reincarnated. Beware! He is very powerful!
description.42: This Dino has been Reborn anew. It's incredibly powerful!
description.57: This old bone helps you remember the path to Skully's cemetery.
description.48: This key allows you to open the Blacksylva Door and access the Magnetic Steppes.
description.30: This Dinoz has defeated the Venerable.
description.23: The Fire Charm increases the strength of your Dinoz Fire attacks.
description.24: Bao Charm increases your Dinoz' defense against Water attacks.
description.7: The upgraded Shovel finally broke, it will have to be fixed before you can use it again.
description.72: The constant changing state of this buoy allows your Dinoz to know if the Sticky Swamp is flooded.
description.73: The special light of this lantern allows your Dinoz to know if the Sticky Swamp is covered in fog.

helperUnlock.title: Unlock
helperUnlock.description: You can choose between teaching your Dinoz a new skill or unlocking several new ones that your Dinoz **can learn from the next level up**.

items.disclaimer: All the items you have obtained during your adventures are gathered here.

description.potion_irma: Madam Irma's famous potion gives Dinoz an **additional, immediate turn**; there's no need to wait to play again.
description.potion_angel: If your Dinoz dies, it's not the end of the game. Use an Angel Potion to **resurrect it**. Thanks to this potion, your Dinoz will return to life without losing any experience points.
description.cloud_burger: This tasty Burger restores 10 health points. It's made from clouds - so it's light and won't give you any indigestion!
description.hot_bread: Soft, warm bread that restores 100 health points to your Dinoz. It's perfect before fighting dragons and other dreadful monsters.
description.meat_pie: For the hungry Dinoz, there's nothing better than a good Meat Pie. This hearty meal instantly restores 30 health points.
description.fight_ration: Keep a Battle Ration in hand during a fight as when things get tough, you will recover **up to 20 health points**.
description.surviving_ration: Keep a Battle Ration in hand during a fight as when things get tough, you will recover **between 10 and 40** health points.
description.goblin_merguez: A specialty of Big All-Hot mountain. Consume in moderation!
description.pampleboum: A bite of this nice and appetizing fruit will restore 15 health points!
description.sos_helmet: Increases your Dinoz' armor by 5% when used.
description.little_pepper: Increases the value of your Dinoz' next assault by 10 points.
description.zippo: Your Dinoz goes up in flames!
description.sos_flame: Nothing better than a Rescue Flamelet to help you during a fight.
description.fuca_pill: Double the speed of your Dinoz' attacks.
description.monochromatic: All of your Dinoz' assaults become of his best element color.
description.poisonite_shot: Protects your Dinoz from the effects of poison.
description.loris_costume: An enemy attacks one of his comrades.
description.vegetox_costume: This costume disguises your Dinoz as a Vegetox Guard during a battle. Warning: It's not very flame-resistant...
description.goblin_costume: This costume disguises your Dinoz as a goblin during a battle. Warning: It's not very flame-resistant...
description.pampleboum_pit: The pit of Grapeboom is extremely fragile and can be broken by the smallest shock. Its contents are extremely toxic! That's why some people use it in battle, in order to gain an advantage during an assault.
description.portable_love: Love gives you wings... your Dinoz will be able to attack flying enemies.
description.danger_detector: This object allows your Dinoz to avoid an indirect injury that would cause the loss of more than 25 HP.
description.pirhanoz_in_bag: A Pirhanoz stored in a bag, ready to be deployed into battle when needed!
description.devil_ointment: A strong ointment, doughy, dark-colored, and with an awful odor. You can rub it on your body in order to cure curses!
description.land_of_ashes: This object turns the combat zone into a suffocating furnace. All Dinoz with a Fire element of less than 10 points can't use A or E skills for the next 3 turns.
description.abyss:
This object plunges the combat zone into an abyss.
**All Dinoz** with a **Water element of less than 10 points** will see the strength of their **assaults** drop by 25% for the next 3 turns.
description.amazon: This object transports the combat zone into the middle of a tropical jungle. All Dinoz with a Wood element of less than 10 points will sleep for the next 3 turns unless they are subjected to an attack which causes them to lose 10 HP or more.
description.st_elmas_fire: This object surrounds the combat zone with a powerful magnetic field. All Dinoz with a Lightning element of less than 10 points will lose 5% of their HP for the next 3 turns.
description.uvavu: This object plunges the combat zone into the middle of a devastating storm. All Dinoz with an Air element of less than 10 points will lose 50% of their speed for the next 3 turns.
description.strong_tea: This ultra-concentrated tea, prepared by Chen herself, allows you to cancel the effects of beer on your team.
description.temporal_stabiliser: Dorogon technology has led to the creation of this object which is capable of breaking the temporal manipulator. Unfortunately it is too fragile to be used more than once.
description.elixir: An incredibly powerful remedy used by only the most powerful Dinoz masters to heal their faithful companions. One potion restores 200 health points.
description.elixir_of_life: Medication able to heal the Venerable of his afflictions. Extracted from the sap of a rare plant, maltus barlus, which only grows in one small patch on the celestial island. Nowadays, it is almost impossible to find it anywhere else.
description.banishement: Prevents Dinoz from calling reinforcements during battles.
description.battering_ram: Dinoz attacks your opponent's castle twice if you are victorious.
description.ember: Increases the fire **assaults** of all Dinoz by 30%.
description.scale: An enemy Dinoz will be killed if your Dinoz dies during the fight.
description.beer: Prevents all Dinoz from recovering health points during the fight.
description.encyclopedia: Increases experience points received at the end of the fight by 15%.
description.antichromatic: Cancels the effect of the Monochromatics used by the enemy.
description.time_manipulator: Dinoz can't use Event Skills anymore.
description.dimensional_powder: As soon as a Dinoz' life falls below 10 HP, it will be engulfed by a black hole and will disappear from the fight.
description.sorcerers_stick: Randomly decreases a Dinoz HP by 30%. Does not work against monsters.
description.friendly_whistle: When your Dinoz attacks another Dinoz, its friends will come and help it.
description.dinoz_cube: The player can roll again on the element grid each time they level-up until level 10.
description.temporal_reduction: Reduces the initiative bonuses and penalties on the equipped Dinoz by 50%.
description.tear_of_life: Gives clones 10% of the life of the Dinoz wearing the tear.
description.cuzcussian_mask: Makes the wearer's teammates invulnerable to Hypnosis.
description.anti_grave_suit: Renders the wearer's team impervious to Black Holes during combat.
description.enchanted_steroid: Protects the carrier against endurance penalties. Their base maximum endurance points cannot be reduced. If the dinoz has skills that raise that base maximum endurance, like Muscular Oxygenation, Dinoz Max-Protein and Moral Support, it can still lose these extra endurance points until the base maximum endurance is reached.
description.curse_locker: Restricts a random enemy to using their weakest element for 3 turns.
description.fear_factor: A Dinoz with the Brave skill and that carries this object can now form groups with Dinoz with the same key element as they do.
description.life_stealer: When the Dinoz goes lower than 20 health points, it drains 30 points from a random opponent to heal itself.
description.fire_sphere: An Elemental Sphere allows your Dinoz to learn one spherical skill!
description.wood_sphere: An Elemental Sphere allows your Dinoz to learn one spherical skill!
description.water_sphere: An Elemental Sphere allows your Dinoz to learn one spherical skill!
description.lightning_sphere: An Elemental Sphere allows your Dinoz to learn one spherical skill!
description.air_sphere: An Elemental Sphere allows your Dinoz to learn one spherical skill!
description.void_sphere: An Elemental Sphere allows your Dinoz to learn one spherical skill!
description.demon_ticket: You receive Demon Tickets when you sacrifice a Dinoz at the Demon shop. You can trade them for a Demon Dinoz once you have enough.
description.treasure_coupon: A Treasury Note is worth 1000 Gold Coins and allows bidding on auctions in the Market Place. It simply needs to be cashed to be converted in gold coins.
description.moueffe_egg: This strange egg is close to hatching into a beautiful Dinoz...
description.moueffe_egg_rare: This strange little egg seems to be ready to transform into an amazing Dino!
description.pigmou_egg: This strange egg is close to hatching into a beautiful Dinoz...
description.pigmou_egg_rare: This baby Softpig is ready to break out, and with these convict stripes, it is certain to strike fear in the hearts of any enemies in battle.
description.winks_egg: This strange egg is close to hatching into a beautiful Dinoz...
description.winks_egg_rare: An egg, covered in a seemingly impenetrable shell, only the creature inside will be able to pierce this armor!
description.planaille_egg: This strange egg is close to hatching into a beautiful Dinoz...
description.planaille_egg_rare: This strange little egg seems to be ready to transform into an amazing Dino!
description.castivore_egg: This strange egg is close to hatching into a beautiful Dinoz...
description.castivore_egg_rare: A ball of hair, which wriggles when tickled, this companion will definitely be good to have around in the future!
description.rocky_egg: This strange egg is close to hatching into a beautiful Dinoz...
description.rocky_egg_rare: A stone block that's as hard as steel, but you can feel something vibrating inside it, a brave heart almost ready to be unleashed into a world of adventure!
description.pteroz_egg: This strange egg is close to hatching into a beautiful Dinoz...
description.pteroz_egg_rare: This strange little egg seems to be ready to transform into an amazing Dino!
description.nuagoz_egg: This strange egg is close to hatching into a beautiful Dinoz...
description.nuagoz_egg_rare: This strange little egg seems to be ready to transform into an amazing Dino!
description.sirain_egg: This strange egg is close to hatching into a beautiful Dinoz...
description.sirain_egg_rare: This Sirain Egg is mysterious, what will it look like?
description.hippoclamp_egg: This strange egg is close to hatching into a beautiful Dinoz...
description.hippoclamp_egg_rare: This strange little egg seems to be ready to transform into an amazing Dino!
description.gorilloz_egg: This strange egg is close to hatching into a beautiful Dinoz...
description.gorilloz_egg_rare: This strange little egg seems to be ready to transform into an amazing Dino!
description.wanwan_egg: This strange egg is close to hatching into a beautiful Dinoz...
description.wanwan_egg_rare: This strange little egg seems to be ready to transform into an amazing Dino!
description.wanwan_baby_rare: This strange little egg seems to be ready to transform into an amazing Dino!
description.santaz_egg: This strange egg is close to hatching into a beautiful Dinoz...
description.santaz_egg_rare: This Santaz egg is not like the others, what could it possibly look like?
description.feross_egg: This Feross egg isn't like all the rest... Directly from the North Pole! It seems that old Father Nicolas delivers more than just presents!
description.feross_egg_rare: This Feross egg is not like the others, this Dinoz seems to be built for combat!
description.feross_egg_christmas: This Smog egg isn't like all the rest... Directly from the North Pole! It seems that old Father Nicolas delivers more than just presents!
description.kabuki_egg: This strange egg is close to hatching into a beautiful Dinoz...
description.kabuki_egg_rare: This strange egg seems ready to hatch into a truly exceptional dinoz...
description.mahamuti_egg: Through the ice you make out a strange shaped object, a ball of hair perhaps?
description.mahamuti_egg_rare: Through the ice you see a strange figure... A fluffy ball with little horns.
description.souffet_egg: This Etherwasp egg is on the point of hatching, what will the Dinoz inside look like?
description.soufflet_egg_rare: This strange little egg seems to be ready to transform into an amazing Dino!
description.toufufu_baby: This baby Tofufu has started to wriggle, it just can't wait to get out on the battlefield!
description.toufufu_baby_rare: This strange egg seems ready to hatch into a truly exceptional dinoz...
description.quetzu_egg: This strange egg is close to hatching into a beautiful Dinoz...
description.quetzu_egg_rare: This strange egg seems ready to hatch into a truly exceptional dinoz...
description.smog_egg: This strange egg seems ready to hatch into a truly exceptional dinoz...
description.smog_egg_anniversary: This odd ball of an egg seems ready to become more than just an egg...
description.smog_egg_christmas_blue: This strange egg seems ready to hatch into a truly exceptional dinoz...
description.smog_egg_christmas_green: This strange egg seems ready to hatch into a truly exceptional Dinoz...
description.triceragnon_baby: This strange little egg seems to be ready to transform into an amazing Dino!
description.triceragnon_baby_rare: This strange little egg seems to be ready to transform into an amazing Dino!
description.christmas_egg: This Christmas egg will surprise you by transforming into either a Santaz or a Triceratops. What a surprise!
description.amnesic_rice: This rice will cause a Dinoz to have amnesia. After eating it a Dinoz forgets its name along with the experience it has gained since its last level up.&&&&//Some urban legend says that this rice can affect the destiny of young Dinoz...//
description.tik_bracelet: This bracelet, created using Caushemesh technology, can restore up to 10 health points each day to the Dinoz who wears it!
description.magic_star: These mysterious stars are scattered throughout Dinoland. Will you be able to find all 7?
description.golden_napodino: Gold Napodinos are solid gold coins dating back to a pre-dinotown civilization. They are highly desired by collectors, and people say that they give luck to Dinoz who choose to carry them.
description.bamboo_friend: A Bambooz Friend will help your Dinoz during battles!
description.candle_card: This Anniversary card gives you access to the sandcastle game at the Frish Port
description.christmas_ticket: Use to play in the Snowplough Game and earn 1,000 gold coins, 5,000 or a Santaz.
description.tictac_ticket: These Tac Tickets will allow you to dig in Grandpa Joe's garden, in search of treasures hidden by his great-grandfather.
description.easter_egg: An Urma's egg can be used to obtain an item among all those that exist in Dinoland. Will it be a rare or common item you'll get?
description.fire_cracker: With this firecracker, you can set off fireworks in Dinotown to earn treasures!
description.special_potion_irma: Madam Irma's famous potion allows the Dinoz who drinks it to *play a new action immediately* without having to wait for the next day. But you can only carry 3.
description.daily_ticket: This ticket allows you to unlock a daily box at the University.
description.box_common: This box seems to contain common objects.
description.box_rare: This shiny box seems to contain rare objects.
description.box_epic: This magnificent box seems to contain something extraordinary.
description.box_legendary: Could this legendary box contain a legend?
description.empty: There is no item at this spot.
description.undefined: This object is unknown, it is rare and it will strongly make developers curious about its existence.

items.empty: This slot is empty, choose an item from the inventory to equip.&&//The equipped items can be used by your Dinoz in combat.//

ingredients.disclaimer: This page lists the ingredients you have found using the "Collect" action.

description.merou_lujidane: A common species in Dinoland and this fish is very popular due to it caramelised taste.
description.poisson_vengeur: It steals leerfish to give to the poor.
description.an_guili_guilille: Most of the Eels are"electric", but this species is refrigerable. People use it to refresh their drinks or to preserve food by wrapping it with them.
description.globulos: Globulos is very soft and sticky but it bounces surprisingly well when thrown against a wall. This funny feature makes it very popular!
description.super_poisson: Defenders of Groupers and Globulos! Nobody really knows the identity of Super-Fish. In fact, no one ever cared... Super-Fish is a greatly unknown hero.
description.touffe_de_fourrure: A handful of good-quality fur! Not enough to make a coat, but it's better than nothing....
description.roche_radio_active: This rock, extracted from the sloughed rock hide of a Groulem, has been affected by exposure to ether and now has a strange glow to it. It's recommended that you don't carry it on your person for any more than a day or you risk losing your hair.
description.griffes_acerees: These claws are less frightening put on a string than on a hairy paw! Make sure you don't hurt yourself.
description.corne_en_chocolat: Although its very rare, sometimes animals are born with a chocolate horn (black or hazelnut chocolate, it depends). Normally these animals don't last long as everybody wants them...
description.oeil_visqueux: This eye makes a really disgusting noise in your bag!
description.langue_monstrueuse: A hunting trophy which would make most Dinoland Masters envious! If in perfect condition, this monster tongue will be sold for a lot of money.
description.energie_foudre: Lightning energy is easy to capture as its all round us. You just have to know how to find it by hitting a stone or moving an iron bar during a thunderstorm.
description.energie_air: In spite of the fact that Air is present everywhere on Dinoland, only certain breezes can be transformed in pure energy.
description.energie_eau: Water Energy can be found on every water surface, but they move so quickly that nobody ever succeeds in capturing them! This is why their price is so high.
description.energie_feu: Fire in its natural state is very valuable.
description.energie_bois: If finding a tree is an easy, then harboring Wood Energy is near impossible! You have often to climb high in the leaves to find it...
description.silex_taille: A sharpened pebble by who-knows-who to do who-knows-what.
description.fragment_de_texte_ancien: The text engraved on this fragment is unreadable. But you can be sure that a collector will pay well to get it.
description.vieil_anneau_precieux: This gold ring dates back hundreds of years and would be a beautiful exhibit in a museum
description.calice_cisele: This Chalice, in the old days, was part of a whole crockery collection (you are free to find the rest). You are impatient to put your hand on the cauldron!
description.collier_karat: This superb piece instantly bestows its wearer with both class and elegance.
description.broche_en_parfait_etat: You're incredibly lucky! This highly valuable brooch is like new, despite its age.
description.superbe_couronne_royale: This extremely rare crown was once worn by the King of Dinoland.
description.feuilles_de_pelinae: Pelinae is liked for the fresh perfume it emits, it can be found in houses throughout Dinoland.
description.bolet_phalisk_blanc: A Mushroom of the Mushgood family, which is easy to cook in a green sauce. Some prefer it in omelettes, others like it in soup, but everybody agrees on the fact that pan-fried Phalisk Boletus is delicious.
description.orchidee_fantasque: An improbable fusion between rare Orchids. It generally grows upside down, covered by a layer of hair which gives it camouflage properties.
description.racine_de_figonicia: Figonicia is a bad-tempered plant. That's the reason why its root are so exposed, it prevents them from growing again.
description.sadiquae_mordicus: Sadiquae Mordicus is very dangerous! Often many meters high, they can digest a human in less than a few hours. At an early age, the worst they can do is eat one of your fingers.
description.flaureole: Pickye Deftlyna is only found on Nimbao. Very difficult to pick, the slightest wrong move and it launches heavenward...
description.spore_etheral: The Ethereal Spore grows on the Caushemesh islands thanks to the eher that runs across their rock. Although inedible, it does give off a pleasant smell if prepared properly.
description.pousse_sombre: The dark fruit relies on the darkness surrounding it for nourishment. Once it comes into contact with sunlight, it desintegrates extremely quickly. It's best to be careful with it and never let it see daylight. Once it has been dried though, it can be conserved for several years.
description.graine_de_devoreuse: Devourer seeds are very rare ingredients which can only be found in the Magnetic Steppes. More important than their rarity, they are highly desired by the finest gourmets, renderring them invaluable.
description.dent_de_dorogon: Very few people can claim to own this particular hunting trophy! This freshly extracted Dorogon Tooth should fetch a nice price.
description.bras_mecanique: This artifact resembles a hand, it must have been made using some forgotten technology, and even if it doesn't work any more, it still has great value...

name.gocol: Climb down to the Precipitous Hills
name.tourup: Go to the top of the Karinbao Tower

description.port: Created by monks many years ago, Frish Port has flourished in recent years thanks to increased trade with the Atlanteid Islands. Unfortunately for you, the fish are so plentiful and easy to catch that there are no boats to take you to the nearby islands. The only ways to reach them are by learning to swim or finding a buoy.
description.market: A large open-air market where everything and anything is bought and sold. Merchants come from all corners of Dinoland to trade their goods here, so from time to time you may find a bargain! Beware, it's also the hideout of unscrupulous people who will attempt to swindle you for your gold coins.
description.papy: Grandpa Joe is an old, retired warrior, but in his younger days he travelled all over Dinoland. These days he tells his stories to any Dinoz Master willing to listen to him. Those who sit and listen to his stories are often offered missions in return.
description.forcebrut: The BrutForce Tournament is one of the most popular competitions among Dinoz tamers. Here, the most powerful Dinoz compete with each other in spectacular battles for the entertainment of the public. Thankfully, the Tournament isn't only reserved for the elite, rookie tamers can also compete here to train their Dinoz.
description.dnv: Welcome to Dinotown! This town was created by the Dinoz tamers a long time ago. After many centuries of existence, it is now the capital of Dinoland and the ideal training ground for young Dinoz masters. Don't hesitate to visit the surrounding areas before adventuring in wilder lands.
description.universite: The University of Dinotown is full of bearded professors and stern-looking, students. Although you can't understand what they're talking about, the fate of the world depends on their research - or so they say. One professor, however, is very friendly; he offers to meet with you from time to time to teach you some important lessons.
description.fountj: The Fountain of Youth has two uses. By day, it's a quiet place where Dinoz Masters, exhausted after their travels, can rest peacefully. By night, it's a haunt where love-lorn residents can let slip a few tears or a forlorn sigh. Some say that the fountain's salty waters are the pained tears of heartbroken lovers.
description.colesc: The Precipitous Hills - a mountain range in its own right. However, they are so close to the nearby \"Big All-Hot\" volcano, they seem tiny. Their slopes are still impossible to climb without the appropriate climbing gear.
description.skull: In a remote corner of the Kingdom of Dinotown sits the Lost Cemetery of Twilight. It's an extremely mysterious place that is the center of many rumors: ghosts, strange apparitions or disappearances, deformed monsters or magic beings... Over time these phenomenons have increased so that some have wondered if the cemetery could be connected to another world...
description.auree: After this point, stretches the deepest, most mysterious, and above all most dangerous forest in all of Dinoland. The greatest adventurers have died here, so be prepared before your Dinoz enter.
description.chemin: Through this immense Forest, you can see a path. It's certainly the path that is used by Dinoz tamers to go through the forest. In any case, it's better to not stray from the path as the risk of getting lost or being devoured by a Korgon is very high.
description.collin: These hills rise from the west side of the forest. They are covered by large dark trees which sometimes seem alive. Many believe that the hills move during the night when nobody is looking. What mystery are these strange hills hiding?
description.fleuve: Jumin River is the largest water feature in Dinoland. It flows through the large Grumhel Forest. Due to its width and the strength of its flow, it's impossible to cross it without advanced swimming equipment. A simple buoy won't be enough...
description.camp: This part of the Forest has been decimated by small creatures called Korgons. They are very bad-tempered and spend their time harassing the various creatures of the Forest. Luckily, this group of Korgons seems to have devoured enough wood, and are not interested in your calves.
description.jungle: Long ago, in this part of the forest which more resembles a Jungle, lived strange creatures. According to folklore, they looked like Ninja-Monkeys. But these creatures haven't been seen for years, to the point that most people doubt that they ever existed.
description.garde: This part of the Jungle is one of the most isolated parts of Dinoland. A few Dinoz masters have adventured here, but even fewer have returned alive. The vegetation is so dense here that it forms a veritable wall which stretches for many kilometers! The only opening is a small portal at the edge of the Blacksylva forest, but it is protected by a strange creature known as the "Forest Warden".
description.chutes: The Mutant Falls are certainly one of the greatest myths of Dinoland. Indeed, the ocean water rushes all day long in this huge hole without its level dropping. Great scientists have imagined that there is a place far away where water returns to the ocean, but no one has ever believed them.
description.baobob: Bao Bob is a strange character. He claims to be one of the representatives of an ancient population of giants that disappeared from the surface of Dinoland hundreds of years ago. His eye has seen more secrets of Dinoland than any living resident. The stories he tells are extraordinary and entertain the children a lot.
description.dome: A town under the sea! The Underwater Dome shelters the last survivors of the Atlantis civilization. In the past, they have dominated the Atlanteid Islands, but a strange disease almost wiped them out. The Dome is still magnificent despite it being centuries old.
description.marais_flood: This swamp in the middle of the archipelago is a real problem for travelers! Depending on the days, it changes its state. People say it has been like this for thousands of years. Some even think that it's a giant living creature with a terrible sense of humor. Today, the swamp is completely flooded ! You can't move! You will have to wait until tomorrow to get out of this quagmire.
description.marais_fog: This swamp in the middle of the archipelago is a real problem for travelers! Depending on the days, it changes its state. People say it has been like this for thousands of years. Some even think that it's a giant living creature with a terrible sense of humor. Today, the swamp is lost in fog... You will not find any monster to fight.
description.marais: This swamp in the middle of the archipelago is a real problem for travelers! Depending on the days, it changes its state. People say it has been like this for thousands of years. Some even think that it's a giant living creature with a terrible sense of humor. The water level is low today: you can move safely.
description.corail: Large quantities of Coral have recently surfaced after having been submerged underwater for years. Coral is extremely popular in Dinoland due to its extraordinary strength. The mines employ hundreds of people.
description.ilewkk: Waïkiki is a small island which forms part of the Atlanteid archipelago. It stands out for its purple palm trees, whose long leaves are used to give bright colors to many clothes on Dinoland. Local humans also practice a very famous Martial Art, Waïkikidô.
description.chbroc: On the top of a rock on the Atlanteid Islands sits a workshop. Some say that the inventor who chose to live there did so to escape the mockery of the other citizens, but it seems to have a more specific purpose...
description.dplaza: This new area is difficult to get to, but many residents migrate here in order to flee the congestion of the capital. You can find everything there, and it has recently become a very fashionable place, where new attractions such as the Dinoz Competition are springing up.
description.villa: A villa apparently, which looks more like a holiday cottage on wheels, seemingly abandoned on the beach, bears the sign: "Warning, Disgruntled Dinoz". Maybe it's best to find another route...?
description.dcine: At the foothills of the Small Canyon, one of the Pre-dinozian caves has been converted into a magnificent Cinema. The latest movies are shown here and budding filmmakers can even come here to learn how to make their own films.
description.clinik: This is the location of the newly built Dinotown Clinic, the treatment here is said to be the best in all of Dinoland.
description.chato: Once through the massive doorway, the throne room lies straight ahead of you. You see a few guards here and there, some talking about the latest fashionable game, others drying their clothes on racks, the atmosphere... relaxed. The king, always in a good mood, awaits you in the throne room.
description.poste: This guard post allows soldiers from the castle to control comings and goings from the royal domain. There is a great view of the King's castle from here. The post is extremely well guarded so it's not a good idea to annoy the soldiers, apparently their captain is merciless!
description.portal: The pentacle drawn on the ground projects a bright light which dissipates the clouds of Nimbao. Unfortunately, the beam is not powerful enough to transport you to the skies. You will have to manage on your own.
description.bslt: The Basalt Slopes are located on the sides of the Big All-Hot. These are large expanses formed of tangled volcanic rocks. A path takes shape there, winding up to the summit. Ambushes are easy and frequent here, so be careful to defend yourself well when taking this path.
description.forges: The Forges work near the top of the Big All-Hot using magma from the volcano in order to create their wares. The magma flows slowly down the side of the main streets, supplying the smiths who are working day and night crafting metallic wares, the best in Dinoland.
description.rashpk: Ashpouk is an ancient civilization located on the top of the Big All-Hot. Unfortunately a volcanic eruption has destroyed their city, and only deserted ruins remain. The locals are very superstitious and never approach the ruins, fearing the curses which are said to exist there.
description.fosslv: The Lavapit is located on top of the Big All-Hot. The view from the Lavapit is magnificent as you see the whole of Dinotown, the Atlanteid Islands, the Great Forest of Grumhel and even the white peaks of Caushemesh when the weather is particularly pleasant. In the center of the plateau stands a Shaman Temple, which has to rebuilt each time an earthquake occurs, which, seeing as its located on the top of a volcano, is a regular occurrence.
description.vener: The Venerable's Lair is the most dangerous place in the Big All-Hot. In a hidden cave lives a very old Flamethrowing Dragon, who is not only bad-tempered but also hates being disturbed. Interestingly, people say that he likes little Korgons... well-grilled, seasoned with a touch of salt.
description.tunel: Near the Lavapit stands a very old tree. Its bark is so dense that even lava flows have not damaged it, which has helped it to survive many volcanic eruptions. Recently, a lava flow has cleared the entrance of a Tunnel at the bottom of the tree. This tunnel seems to burrow deep into the Big All-Hot. In order to explore it, you will need a Lantern to guide you.
description.gorges: The Deep Gorges are a narrow rock passage on the side of the Big All-Hot. After a succession of flooded valleys, the gorges open up into an immense Forest. You can see the Jumin River flowing to the south. Without doubt, you can now access the Northern part of Grumhel Forest!
description.tourbt: A ginormous tower stands tall on the Great Heat. It pierces the clouds, hiding the summit from your view. The journey to the top will be long but the view is worth the detour.
description.senter: The path that crosses the Blacksylva Door leads directly to an immense steppe of burning sand stretching as far as the eye can see... Some electric arcs menacingly roar in the sky. The sand is the result of Lodestone friction, the rock which can be found in huge quantity in this region...
description.scross: The deep path that lies here, has been maintained for generations by the Rocky slaves transporting Lodestone between the Citadel in the north and Grumhel Forest. This road is now too dangerous to travel on alone. Another, safer route has been found beyond the "Sabot", to the east
description.svillg: The Outpost is a relay point for the merchants coming from Grumhel. Much safer than Nomad's Junction, this stop is the last peaceful haven before the dangers that await you in the Magnetic Steppes.
description.sking: At the center of the steppes stands a large, mysterious rock. The Citadel of the Rocky King is located inside. For generations, the royal family - half-human half-mineral - have controlled the Rockies and they exercise their authority throughout the Magnetic Steppes.
description.spylon: Located in the middle of the desert are the Pylons, a natural formation of Lodestone that continually creates the mighty electric arcs! It's better to not stay here too long, as you may be electrocuted by the Pylons.
description.slake: The quicksand here is extremely dangerous: full of Lodestone, it appears just like water. Many thirsty adventurers have fallen for this intricate trap and have been swallowed alive. People say that for each victim, the Syphon emits a melodic whistle, hence it's haunting name.
description.scanyo: Between the high plateau of Neerheeven are the Neerhel Paths. Notorious due to the many Dinoz who have fallen victim to the Lodestone rockfalls. The ground is covered by jagged and burning stones, and the lodestone rock faces regularly generate deadly electric arcs in the middle of the road.
description.stowr1: Dinoz Masters have fought for eternity to take control of the Devourer's daily seed production. There are three Devourers in the Magnetic Steppes, but people say that they all have the same origin. Only a Great Lord will be able to capture and control the three Devourers!
description.stowr2: Dinoz Masters have fought for eternity to take control of the Devourer's daily seed production. People say that whoever gathers 100 seeds will see his wish granted. In the meantime, the seeds are resold for a very good price to the Traveling Merchant.
description.stowr3: Dinoz Masters have fought for eternity to take control of the Devourer's daily seed production. According to the legend of the Nomads, Devourers feed on the blood shed by their victims.
description.sband1: The Zaxa have always been pillagers and are highly logical, renowned for their flawless skill and errorless work. Their convoy attacks are even recognized by local tourist guides…
description.sband2: The Emmemma are pitiless mercenaries well known for their ancient ambush tactics. First, they send massive boulders into the ravine, then attack with clubs until their foes have been beaten an inch within their lives. Then they scavenge. Only then do we pick up. No arguing no hassling.
description.sband3: The Mattmut are the specialists of filtering and piped-up games. Less aggressive than their neighbors, they are no less dangerous, provided you hold your gold. Their technique consists of exhausting the opponent with their traditional songs.
description.scampw: The hidden lair of the W-Team… They take refuge there in times of great danger, in order to heal their wounds and prepare their counter-attack! These nomads have a will of steel and never admit defeat. Many of their enemies have perished for having slackened their attention, believing to have struck them down for good…
description.scaush: On the fringes of the Steppes stands an impassable rocky barrier... you can see a chain of mountains in the distance, the homeland of the Santaz: the Caushemesh Mountains. Who knows what dangers and what adventures await you there, if you ever manage to get there...
description.sport: Hidden most of the time by sandstorms, an imposing gate stands in the wilderness of the steppes, at the foot of the Caushemesh Mountains. As the only point of entry into this mysterious kingdom, it prevents anyone from entering it - or would it rather be from leaving it?
description.iroche: You are on a peninsula at one end of the celestial island of Nimbao, where large rocks protrude from the ground. Some people call these the dragon's horns. Very few people come here, probably because there is nothing to do except contemplate the void...
description.ipont: The only way to cross this precipice is to cross the bridge. A violent wind is blowing, best watch your step. Due to this being the only point of entry to the rest of the island, the bridge is often guarded by Grizorg's soldiers.
description.iporte: A stone plaque states that only those who are chosen may pass through this gate.
description.icite: The city of Arboris is dug into the rock. These peaceful people live in harmony here, and each generation must contribute to the community, even though the majority of men are practically press-ganged into joining Grizorg's guards.
description.ilacro: A rock protrudes from the celestial lake. The water here is pure and cool, which makes it a very popular place for the people of Arboris. Bathing, however, is strictly forbidden, much to the disappointment of most Arborians.
description.iplain: A vast white plain stretches as far as the eye can see, snow is only found on the northern part of the island.
description.isnow2: A forest permanently covered in a blanket of snow stands in the middle of the uniform whiteness of the plains. A timeless calm envelops anyone who dares cross the forest...
description.imont: Considered by everyone as a sacred mountain, Everwest has a sharp peak which few have dared to try to climb. It became sacred during the reign of the former Archdorogon who used to come and meditate at its summit.
description.ihaut: A cavern which seems to have been dug into the summit of the holy mountain. There appears to be some kind of laboratory at the back of the cave. There are numerous vials of every color stored inside. What kind of research was the former Archdorogon involved in up here...
description.voie: From far away, the immense observatory imposes its silhouette on the panorama that is open to all. It is located on Nimbao's tail. It points its objective towards the surface, the study of stars is probably less integrated than the monitoring of the Caushemesh Mountains.
description.observ: The observatory is also a large library that boasts an impressive number of books about Dinoland's history. Unfortunately, the books are written in the language of the former Dorogons, so you cannot learn more.
description.egout: The pillar structure supporting the Archdorogon Palace incorporates a whole structure used to transport pure water into the different parts of the Dorogon city.
description.ilac: The water from the lake seems to constantly flow into the void, but the falls keep on flowing... Could it be cloud condensation that allows the island to have so much water available?
description.ilac2: Behind the lakes, there is a vast expanse in the shape of a wing, there is nothing on the horizon apart from green plains bathed in sunlight. You feel the powerful wind which clears this peaceful stratch of land, you make out the tip of the wing, very few people will have seen it from the very edge though...
description.prison: The infernal prison they call the Nimbao Hilton only opens its doors once for visitors, nobody who has entered has ever come back out. Here is where they imprisoned anyone who questioned Archdorogon Grizorg's authority.
description.ville1: The Dorogon city is rich and luxurious, The residents seem really relaxed, unlike the swarms of guards that patrol the town.
description.ville2: This part of the Dorogon city offers a spectacular view of Nimbao. An enormous pillar supports the archway leading to the Archdorogon's palace.
description.sommet: The view is splendid, you are at the very top of the celestial island of Nimbao, from a distance you can make out the Archdorogon's palace, bathed in light, it is a fair representation of the hegemony of the powerful Dorogon civilization.
description.palais: The Archdorogon palace is the pinnacle of Dorogon architecture, examples of bygone technologies reliant upon fresh water can be seen all over town. The palace is nonetheless immense, and sometimes labyrinthine to the uninitiated...
description.mport: Monster Port is true to its name. Here you'll meet all types of monsters which live on the island. The port is configured in an odd way, it almost seems as if it's split into two separate parts.
description.mfoutp: The border between the Frutox and Vegetox kingdoms is heavily guarded. The outpost controlled by the Frutox is a strategic location from which they can spy on the Vegetox and defend the Royal Palace.
description.mfpalc: Grotox is the king of the Frutox. he is considered the most powerful Frutox among his people and he rules his kingdom with an iron fist.
description.mforst: The sacred Kaze Kami forest is renowned as being the habitat of the ancient Grotox. Ancient ruins lie at the heart of the forest which are said to contain hidden treasure...
description.mvoutp: The Vegetox outpost is hidden within a lush forest. It is occupied by the Vegetox special forces, who are trained at the Elite Camp, which includes specialists in military strategy.
description.mvpalc: True fortress, home of the king of Vegetox, the palace of Antraxov is obviously a well guarded place. Multiple guards patrol the area, an intruder would have a hard time trying to infiltrate this place. The Palace is magnificent: a huge tree sculpted with decorations that remind you of Cuzcoussian symbols.
description.mcuzco: Hidden in an isolated corner of Monster Island are the ancient ruins of the capital of the Monster Empire. Today Cuzcous is no more than a pile of rocks overgrown with plants, but the buildings that are still standing show signs of a large and powerful civilization. Many treasures are said to lie beneath these stones...
description.mcelit: At the heart of the Vegetox kingdom lies the training camp of the Vegetox special forces: the Elite Camp. Here the best Vegetox soldiers are trained so that they can one day win the war against the Frutox. Even though the war has lasted many centuries, the soldiers desire to win the war is as strong as ever.
description.dkbao: On the other side of the portal lies an unknown yet curiously familiar place. Screams can be heard in the distance. Your Dinoz will have to stay on his guard if he wants to survive!
description.dkchut: Through the heavy fog, we hear a far away scream, some water flows violently past. It's better not to swim too far, the current is very violent....
description.dktow: A tall Black Tower stands here. At first glance it seems uninhabited, but piles of Dinoz bones lie at the entrance. The large dark door to the Tower appears half-open. It's better stay outside, entering the Tower would be suicidal!
description.dktow2: The crudely built walls all look the same, it wouldn't take much to get totally lost here. Fortunately there is only one route to the top.
description.dktow3: The long ascent continues, this inhospitable tower seems to be inhabited solely by creatures who don't seem inclined to want to leave you in peace to make your way to the top.
description.dktow4: The first dungeon in the dark tower, the entrance to which has just appeared, the dark world is constantly evolving...
description.dktowa: The second dungeon in the dark tower, the entrance to which has just appeared, the dark world is constantly evolving...
description.dktowb: The third dungeon in the dark tower, the entrance to which has just appeared, the dark world is constantly evolving...
description.dktows: The last dungeon in the dark tower, the entrance to which has just appeared, the dark world is constantly evolving...
description.fake: A deserted island, commonly known as the Isle of Damnation, where anguished souls come to die. It's particularly dark here...
description.fake2: A desert island, commonly known as the Isle o' Will-o-the-wisp, these spirits spread hopelessness and death. It's particularly dark over here...
description.rechut: Thanks to the piece of the piece of the Dark Orb you have in your possession, you can return to the surface. The overwhelming brightness blinds you for a few minutes, spending too much time in the Dark World doesn't seem to be a great idea.

marais.flooded: The swamp is flooded today, you won't be able to get out of it.
marais.foggy: The swamp is covered by a thick fog today, you surely won't find any monster to fight.

dinoz.help: Welcome to the Dinoz enclosure ! Here, **daily**, you can discover the various Dinoz options available for adoption. Choose the one that suits you best.

confirm.classic: Do you wish to buy {quantity} {item} for a total of {value} gold?
confirm.filou: Do you wish to buy {quantity} goods for a total of {sold} {item}?
confirm.magic: Do you wish to buy {item} for a total of {sold} napodinos?

item.help: Select an item from the list to examine it...
item.advice_1: Do you want to play again without having to wait for tomorrow? Madam Irma's potion is here for you!
item.title: Merchant:

flying.name: Dinoland Flying Shop
flying.description: The Dinoland Flying Shop is always accessible. Just whistle (loudly - the shop can be a little hard of hearing) and the store will come, allowing you to purchase a variety of basic items. As you explore Dinoland, you'll come across other Shops with more interesting items.

forge.name: Forges Shop
forge.description: The Forges are where items made from the fire of the Big All-Hot are also sold. You can find lots of useful items for battle there.

magic.name: Magic Shop
magic.description: Hidden away in a small Dinotown street, adventurers sometimes get lost and thus find the Magic Shop. Only extremely rare and powerful items are sold here. They can't be bought with common or garden gold coins. However, these items are bewitched: once equipped by a Dinoz, you won't be able to remove them for several days!

cursed.name: Cursed Shop
cursed.description: The Cursed Shop sells rare items that cannot be found elsewhere. As it is said that whoever enters it is cursed for life, only those who are already cursed dare to venture there...

fruity.name: Fruity Shop
fruity.description: "If you leave gold in the bucket hanging from the old tree, a fruit will fall!"

razad.name: At Razad
razad.description: Razad is an old nomad who fled the western steppes, which had become too dangerous for his business. Today, his store is much more modest than before, but at least it is secured at the Rocky's Outpost.

souk.name: Souk "Lightning Sales"
souk.description: The souk is located slightly away from the Magnetite Pylons, offering a very nice view of the electric arcs that often form in this region. Unfortunately, the shop is not out of the arcs' reach, which poses some obvious problems...

neerhel.name: Provider of Neerhel
neerhel.description: The Purveyor's small shop is hidden in the depths of the Neerhel canyons, in a well protected creek. Very useful when you sense you are in danger.

barbarian.name: Barbarian Barter
barbarian.description: "No bargains. You not touch goods. NO TOUCHING! If you touch, me CRUSH you!"

secret.name: Secret Store
secret.description: "Team-W's secret store contains all the Magnetic Steppes items in one place, and above all at very reasonable prices!"

elit.name: Elite Boutique
elit.description: You will find in this shop various objects that the Vegetox special forces often use during their dangerous missions.

chens.name: Chen's Shop
chens.description: Chen provides you with consumable skills, they are so powerful that they destroy themselves after use. They are to be used sparingly.

merchant.name: Travelling Merchant
merchant.description: The Traveling Merchant walks through all of Dinoland and buys the Ingredients from the Dinoz Masters: he offers a lot of gold!
merchant.dimanche: The Traveling Merchant has taken his day off, wait until tomorrow to be able to sell your ingredients again. Of course, the Traveling Merchant will have moved to a different place, so it will be necessary to find him before you can sell your ingredients.

filou.name: Shadowy Man
filou.description: It's pretty expensive, but on the face of it, there is no other way to obtain it easily...

name.waroc: Portrait of a man with empty eyes

description.perle: Using the pearl your Dinoz can recover health at the Fountain of Youth each day.
description.pteroz: The Pteroz' trophy is awarded to players who have defeated the strange Pteroz. It also unlocks Pteroz in the Dinoz shop.
description.hippo: The Hippoclamp's Trophy is awarded to players who have defeated the wild Hippoclamp. It also unlocks Hippoclamps in the Dinoz Shop.
description.rocky: The Rocky's Trophy is awarded to players who have defeated the sleeping Rocky. It also unlocks Rockies in the Dinoz Shop.
description.quetzu: The Quetzu's Trophy is awarded by Mandragore to players who have defeated the Archdorogon Grizorg. It alose unlocks Quetzus in the Dinoz Shop.
description.labowi: The Smog's Trophy was given by Professor Henderson during the Corrupt Lab Crisis. Unfortunately, only one smog could be created during this quest.
description.tour: This yellow jersey awards you for your beautiful Dinoland's tour ! You are now part of Dinoland's greatest explorers.
description.vener: The Eye of the Venerable is an extremely rare item. Only the greatest warriors can obtain it! It is said to have incredibly powerful magical properties...
description.taurus: You helped Bao Bob push the mighty Infernal Moueffe Taurus into the depths of the Dark World. You are not going to see it again, your courage is already beginning to cross the borders of Dinoland.
description.belius: You have defeated the powerful Belius, the infernal Santaz. He has been sent back to the depths of the Dark World. This trophy allows you to unlock 3 additional races of demon Dinoz in the Demon Shop.
description.scorp: You expelled the powerful infernal Winks Scorpus. He is back in the depths of the Dark World.
description.msg: This unlimited dinozian postal services approved stamp's stock validates your Dinotown trip
description.magnet: You have been gifted this negative magnetite shard by the Rockies' king himself ! Who knows what kind of mysterious powers it holds...
description.plume: This feather, gifted from someone far away, allows editing player's presentation.
description.kaura: This aura allows you accessing the totem island and finding - maybe - Kabuki having survived the Great Cataclysm !
description.demon: This old scroll will allow you to access the demonic shop at the downfall Cemetery !
description.pmi: The Little Illustrated Missionary allows you to have access at any time to the list of missions completed and remaining to be done for your Dinoz.
description.pda: The P.D.A. is a stone filled (surprisingly) with naturally formed technology that allows a master to have an overview of all his Dinoz at a glance. The Diamantite on the other hand is just for show.
description.fdjv1: This trophy is a thanks to the players who made a long journey to the 2010 edition of the Gaming Festival to meet the shadow puppeteers!
description.dico1: A very old book, maybe it will help you decipher something? Unfortunately for now, it is closed by a very complex lock. Does anyone know how to open it ? For now, it seems that no one can...
description.dicarb: A very old book, you managed to open it, it can now help decipher the Arboris language.
description.caush: A doll bearing the image of Mandragore, it can be used as a voodoo doll, a punching-ball or a pillow, it's up to you. It is in a pitiful state, the previous owner must have let off steam on it quite often.
description.fmedal: You have reconstructed the medallion which allows you to access a new part of the celestial island of Nimbao. You must find the correct place to use this medallion in order to use the portal correctly.
description.war1a: This necklace was forged from a rare mineral and it was awarded to the strongest warriors during the 1st Clan War!
description.war1b: Rumors say that by touching this strange stone you can go mad causing strange behavior. In any case the stone is very rare, reserved only for impressive Dinoz masters during the 1st Clan War!
description.war2a: This jewel, composed of three blood gems set in an aura of darkness, was awarded to the best tacticians during the 2nd Clan War!
description.war2b: A piece of uncut tawny-amber, a highly valuable rare material, offered to Dinoz who showed remarkable bravery during the 2nd Clan War!
description.war3a: Your talents as master builder of the castle have been recognized, and this enchanted trowel was awarded only to the best clans during the 3rd Clan War!
description.war3b: This highly valuable nail, made entirely from jade, was offered to masters who showed remarkable bravery during the 3rd Clan War!
description.war4a: This shield was given to Clans who crushed their enemies defenses during the 4th Clan War!
description.war4b: The stone of orientation was given to Clans who distinguished themselves during the 4th Clan War. The stone allows you to find your way in the caves, but it always indicates to turn left.
description.war5a: By repeatedly destroying the castles of your enemies during the 5th Clan War, you have finally found a perfectly preserved Goblin Skull, congratulations !
description.war5b: This rare magical bell was used to broadcast your accomplishments during the 5th Clan War. Perfect for impressing your friends, but unfortunately there is no 'OFF' switch...
description.warfa: This mug is bewitched by the spirit of a mog, which sings a ballad every hour to keep you awake, therefore allowing you to defend your clan at any time. It's a fitting reward for your awesome exploits in the 5th Clan War, even if there's a decent chance it'll end up gathering dust in a cupboard.
description.warfb: It is said that Chokokookies are the Dorogons' snack of choice. You have been awarded this to thank you for your impressive contribution to the 5th Clan War. You have tried it, and it tastes like roast Korgon, only sweeter.
description.warga: Gold armor - commonly called Arm'or' is very useful for parades and festivals. Unfortunately it's not very effective in fights. It was only awarded to winners of the 7th Clan War.
description.wargb: You have received the Demyon Boots for your participation in the 7th Clan War. No longer will your Dinoz get blisters on their feet while attacking enemy castles.
description.warha: A gold ring, studded with three rubies "one ring to beat them all" is engraved in small writing on the inside. Only the winners of the 8th Clan War deserve to wear it!
description.warhb: A pale blue ring, given as a reward to clan members following their exploits during the 8th Clan War... Legends tell of certain people going crazy upon wearing it...
description.waria: For winning the 9th Clan War, you have been awarded this samurai helmet! Its previous owner was a powerful shogun who won countless battles, the helmet striking fear in the very hearts of the enemies who saw it. Unfortunately, it is just too shiny to be worn in battles.
description.warib: The ghost samurai helmet is reputed to guard the souls of warriors who fought against it on the battlefield. it is the proof of your considerable achievements in the 9th Clan War. However, these helmets are now purely decorative, as it is impossible to wear the helmet without hearing the screams of the ghosts within...
description.waric: You have found a helmet belonging to someone who participated in a great war. It is proof of your valiant conduct during the 9th Clan War. This helmet is of poor quality, so it's not that surprising that the soldier who wore it was defeated by their enemy.
description.warja: This sword holds a great secret. According to legend, it was broken during an epic combat in an ancient war. Its blade was forged in the purest crystallized mana. You have been awarded this sword for winning the 1st Mana War.
description.warjb: Having received sufficient quantities of mana during the 1st Mana War, the King authorized you to keep some in a sealed chest to reward you for your extraordinary efforts during these troubled times.
description.warjc: It is quite rare that a drop of Mana crystalises at the bottom of the storage reservoirs. Once this forms, the Mana can no longer be used as energy, but the object itself is sufficiently rare to attract dedicated collectors. It is a beautiful trophy which was awarded to you for your valiant performance in the 1st Mana War.
description.warka: Baby Djinn is a powerful being, valuable ally on the battlefield, it will decimate your enemies when fully grown... which should be in a few hundred years! You have been awarded MiniDjinn for winning the 2nd Mana War.
description.warkb: Baby Ifrit is hot-blooded, and will engulf your enemies in flames when fully grown... which should be in a few hundred years! You have been awarded Minifrit for putting in an excellent performance in the 2nd Mana War!
description.warkc: A young shoot of the powerful Yggdrasil fell at your feet during a ferocious battle during the 2nd Mana War. Once fully grown, Miniggdra will get ever bigger and better, taking you even closer to legend status!
description.warla: This vestige of a bygone civilisation now floats aimlessly in the skies. The King has given it to you in the hope that you'll do the housework from time to time... Watch out though, the generator will only work for around a century, after which time the citadel will crash to earth on Dinoland. In any case, it has been given to you in recognition of your triumph in the 3rd Mana War.
description.warlb: You have won an unforgettable stay in the tower room of the extravagant Jade Palace, which offers magnificent views over all of Dinoland. This stay has been awarded to you in recognition of your performance in the 3rd Mana War!
description.warlc: The King has rewarded you with a stay in the unspoiled floating islands. You will have to tidy the place up a bit after you recover from the 3rd Mana War.
description.warma: The King's head chef has prepared his specialty for you. This hamburger is reserved exclusively for the elite warriors of the 4th Mana War. Only a few masters have ever tasted this culinary delight.
description.warmb: In recognition of a terrific performance in the 4th Great Mana War, the King's head chef has prepared one if the finest Gromster Nimbao Ribsteaks you will ever experience. Once you've sampled a few, you start to appreciate the effort required to transport the whole thing to Dinotown in one piece.
description.warmc: The giant chickens are not rare, but when the King's head chef gets a hold of one it becomes very much something out of the ordinary. This will delight your senses after a great effort in participating in the 4th Great Mana War.
description.warna: This unique relic, forged by the most famous blacksmith in Dinoland, pays tribute to a great Dinoz master. This was awarded to you for winning the 5th Mana War. The last war of the Epoqalypse!
description.warnb: Forged at the very heart of Dinoville Castle, this ring allows the wearer to see life through rose-tinted glasses and to smell of fish, it was awarded to you in recognition of your performance in the 5th Mana War. The last war of the Epoqalypse!
description.warnc: Never go to war without your belt on, and if you get starving, no problem, easily portable, it can even double as a pillow. Enjoy your prize for participating in the 5th Mana War. The last war of the Epoqalypse!
description.waroa: This portrait of a famous martial arts master (an old acquaintance of master Zenith it seems) comes to you for your victory in the 6th Mana War. May his face show you the way in battle.
